preamble: The palatalization of the voiceless alveolar fricative [s] to the voiceless alveolo-palatal fricative [ɕ]. This is a frequent process before high front vowels.
sources: Vance, T. J. (2008). The Sounds of Japanese.
Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
